title: Harness Bootstrap Config Schema
description: Configuration schema for the FastMCP harness to read at boot, defining how the MCP server binds and starts.

server_name.description: Name of the FastMCP server instance.

port.description: Port to bind the MCP server to if using HTTP.

transport.description: Transport mechanism for the MCP server.

auto_discover_rows.description: If true, the bootloader automatically scans for manifest.toml files in rows.
